positive.stdout:
% SZS status CounterSatisfiable for positive.tptp
% SZS output start Saturation.
cnf(u27,negated_conjecture,
    ~vertebrate(harry)).

cnf(u30,negated_conjecture,
    ~backbone(harry)).

cnf(u34,axiom,
    ~reproduce_by_mating(harry)).

cnf(u17,axiom,
    ~vertebrate(X0) | backbone(X0)).

cnf(u16,axiom,
    ~backbone(X0) | reproduce_by_mating(X0)).

cnf(u19,axiom,
    bee(harry)).

cnf(u18,axiom,
    ~bee(X0) | ~reproduce_by_mating(X0)).

% SZS output end Saturation.
% SZS output start Definitions and Model Updates.
for all inputs,
    define animal(X0) := $true
for all inputs,
    define queen_bee(X0) := $false
for all inputs,
    define invertebrate(X0) := $true
% SZS output end Definitions and Model Updates.
% Termination reason: Satisfiable
